section_name: Change of Driver’s License or Personal Identification Certificate Number
text:
(a) The department shall issue to a person a new driver’s license number or personal identification certificate number on the person’s showing a court order stating that the person has been the victim of domestic violence.

(b) The department may require each applicant to furnish the information required by Section 521.142 (Application for Original License) . If the applicant’s name has changed, the department may require evidence identifying the applicant by both the former and new name.

(c) Except as provided by Sections 521.049 (Information Supplied to Certain Governmental Entities) (c), 730.005 (Required Disclosure) , and 730.006 (Required Disclosure with Consent) , the department may not disclose:

(1) the changed license or certificate number; or

(2) the person’s name or any former name.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.275 — Change of Driver’s License or Personal Identification Certificate Number

(a) The department shall issue to a person a new driver’s license number or personal identification certificate number on the person’s showing a court order stating that the person has been the victim of domestic violence.

(b) The department may require each applicant to furnish the information required by Section 521.142 (Application for Original License) . If the applicant’s name has changed, the department may require evidence identifying the applicant by both the former and new name.

(c) Except as provided by Sections 521.049 (Information Supplied to Certain Governmental Entities) (c), 730.005 (Required Disclosure) , and 730.006 (Required Disclosure with Consent) , the department may not disclose:

    (1) the changed license or certificate number; or

    (2) the person’s name or any former name.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 709, Sec. 2, eff. Sept. 1, 1999; Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 1189, Sec. 26, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department shall issue to a person a new driver’s license number or personal identification certificate number on the person’s showing a court order stating that the person has been the victim of domestic violence.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department may require each applicant to furnish the information required by Section 521.142 (Application for Original License) . If the applicant’s name has changed, the department may require evidence identifying the applicant by both the former and new name.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: Except as provided by Sections 521.049 (Information Supplied to Certain Governmental Entities) (c), 730.005 (Required Disclosure) , and 730.006 (Required Disclosure with Consent) , the department may not disclose:
the changed license or certificate number; or
the person’s name or any former name.
